string-array.name: stories
string-array.item: The Brave Rabbit: Once upon a time, a brave rabbit saved the forest...
The Lost Crown: In a faraway kingdom, a crown was lost and a young prince went on a journey...
Magic Tree: A magical tree grew in the village that could talk and grant wishes...
The Clever Fox: A clever fox outsmarted the hunters and helped the other animals...
The Secret Garden: Behind the old mansion, there was a secret garden full of wonders...
